title: Help improve civic-pulse
intro: civic-pulse is open source. The fastest way to flag an error, suggest a source, or propose a feature is to open an issue or pull request on GitHub.

sections.title: Open an issue or pull request
paragraphs: The project lives at https://github.com/celiknimani/civic-pulse. Use the GitHub issue tracker for bug reports, factual corrections, methodology questions, and feature requests.
Code, data, and documentation changes are welcome as pull requests. Small, focused PRs with a clear description are easiest to review and merge.

sections.title: What helps most in an issue or PR
paragraphs: Include the page URL, the claim that should be reviewed, the official source that contradicts or completes it, and the specific change you propose.
Requests linked to official documents, decisions, communications, or transcripts are easier to review and update.

sections.title: Work with 38Shift
paragraphs: For partnerships, custom deployments, or to build something similar for another country or institution, reach 38Shift at https://38shift.com or email hello@38shift.com.

note: For questions about privacy, analytics, or the use of cookies, see the privacy policy page.
